summary: Script is well-written (type hints, error handling, modular design), but deliverable is critically incomplete. Workflow references tests/test_unit.py and fixtures/ that don't exist—act will fail. Missing: (1) test files and evidence of TDD approach, (2) fixture files, (3) actionlint validation, (4) act-result.txt artifact. Workflow uses `--break-system-packages` (anti-pattern; should use venv). Does not meet GitHub Actions requirement: 'ALL TESTS MUST RUN THROUGH ACT' nor TDD requirement. Script alone would rate ~4/5, but incomplete CI/CD pipeline fails to ship.
